hypothesis: Swarm Brier score 0.20-0.30 (F-FORE1 prediction). Bear predictions overconfident, neutral predictions best calibrated.
expect: Mean Brier in [0.20, 0.30]. Bear overconfidence gap > +0.15. Neutral predictions highest accuracy.
diff: Mean Brier 0.2298 — within predicted 0.20-0.30 range, CONFIRMED. Bear overconfidence +0.300, CONFIRMED (predicted >0.15). Neutral 100% accuracy CONFIRMED but underconfident (-0.525), not just 'best calibrated'. Surprise: directional accuracy 42.9% yet good Brier — low confidence masks wrong direction. Bull predictions most calibrated (+0.008), not predicted.
effect_size: Bear overconfidence 0.300 (large). Bull calibration gap 0.008 (negligible). Neutral underconfidence -0.525 (large, unexpected).
self_apply: Scorer validates its own meta-prediction (Brier 0.20-0.30) — CONFIRMED within range
